title: Village Healthcare [Backport]
description: A mod that lets clerics and blacksmiths heal villagers and iron golems respectively.
body:
This mod allows clerics to heal other villagers at 5HP per action, and any type of blacksmith to heal iron golems at 25HP per action.

Planned:
-~~1.20~~ 
-~~all of 1.19~~ 
-all of 1.18
